meta.title: SelfCut - Free online video editor: edit without installing anything
meta.description: Edit your videos right in the browser: cut, adjust the sound, slow down, add fades and export in the right format for YouTube, TikTok or Reels. Free, no watermark, no account, and your videos stay on your device.
og.title: SelfCut - Edit your videos without installing anything
og.description: Cut, tweak and export your videos for YouTube, TikTok or Reels, right in the browser. Free, no watermark, and your videos stay on your device.
twitter.description: Video editing right in the browser: free, no watermark, and your videos stay on your device.
og.imageAlt: The SelfCut interface: video preview, editing toolbar, and timeline with a video clip and its audio track.
schema.browserReq: Browser with WebCodecs (recent Chrome, Edge, Safari)
schema.description: Video editor that runs entirely in the browser: cut, adjust the sound, slow down, add fades and export for YouTube, TikTok, Reels or as MP3. Free, no watermark, no file is ever uploaded.
hero.title:
Nothing to install.
Edit your video now.
hero.lead: SelfCut opens in your browser and you start editing right away: cut your footage, adjust the sound, add your music, export in the right format for YouTube, TikTok or Reels. No watermark, no subscription, and your videos stay on your device.
privacy.title: Free and private, for real
privacy.intro: All the editing happens on your device: your videos are never sent to any server. That is also why SelfCut can be entirely free: no servers to pay for, so nothing to charge you for.
privacy.p1.title: Zero install
privacy.p1.body: No software to download, no account to create. Open the tab, import your videos, edit.
privacy.p2.title: Zero watermark
privacy.p2.body: Your video comes out clean: no logo in the corner, no pro version to pay for to remove it.
privacy.p3.title: Zero leaks
privacy.p3.body: Your videos stay on your device. They are never sent anywhere: nobody else sees them.
features.title: Everything you need to edit fast
features.intro: Whether it is your first TikTok or your hundredth video, you will feel at home: CapCut-style gestures on your phone, Premiere and Vegas shortcuts on your computer.
features.tracks.dd: Layer video, b-roll and music, and move your clips freely from one track to another.
features.cut.dd: Split a clip with one key (<kbd>S</kbd>), trim it by its edges, keep only the best.
features.sound.dd: Per-clip volume, slow motion or speed-up, fade in and out, image cropping.
features.preview.dd: Watch your edit in real time: sound and picture stay perfectly in sync.
features.export.dd: YouTube in 16:9, TikTok, Reels and Shorts in 9:16, or MP3 to keep only the sound (<kbd>Ctrl</kbd>+<kbd>E</kbd>).
features.mobile.dd: Touch gestures and actions that show up at the right moment: edit from your phone, just like CapCut.
features.lang.dd: Interface in English, French, German, Spanish and Portuguese (Brazil).
exports.title: The right format for every network
exports.intro: Tell SelfCut where your video will be published and it handles the rest: framing, resolution, file format.
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: Are my videos uploaded to a server?
faq.a1: No. All the editing happens directly in your browser, on your device. Your videos are never sent anywhere: nobody else can see them, not even us.
faq.a2: Yes, entirely: no account, no subscription, no watermark, no hidden pro version. The editing runs on your device, so there are no servers to pay for, and therefore nothing to charge you for.
faq.a3: MP4 in 16:9 for YouTube, MP4 in 9:16 for TikTok, Reels and Shorts, and MP3 if you only want to keep the sound.
faq.a4: Yes. On your phone you edit with your thumb using simple gestures, just like CapCut. On a computer you get a precise timeline and the keyboard shortcuts of Premiere or Vegas.
faq.a5: Yes, automatically, on your device. Reopen SelfCut in the same browser and you pick up your edit right where you left it.
closing.title: Your next video is one click away
closing.intro: Nothing to download, nothing to pay, no account to create. The editor opens and you edit.
footer.tagline: SelfCut · Free video editing, right in the browser
